About Michael Stevens

IAR (Investment Adviser Representative), Founder of Capital Wealth Advisors

Professional Background

Michael Stevens founded Capital Wealth Advisors in 2010 with a mission to provide fiduciary financial advice to Utah families approaching or in retirement. Originally on a pre-med track, his path changed after his father's passing, leading him to discover his passion for helping families navigate complex financial decisions.

After completing his BS in Business Management at Utah Valley University, Michael earned his Series 66 certification and built Capital Wealth Advisors into one of Utah's premier retirement planning firms.

Credentials & Licenses

  • Series 66 Investment Adviser Representative
  • California Insurance License #0G96805
  • BS Business Management, Utah Valley University
  • Fiduciary Standard Commitment

Media & Community Leadership

As a trusted voice in financial planning, Michael Stevens regularly appears on Utah radio programs to share retirement planning insights and answer questions from listeners across the state.

Beyond media appearances, Michael serves on the board of Junior Achievement of Utah, where he helps educate young people about financial literacy and entrepreneurship.

Board & Community Service

  • Board Member, Junior Achievement of Utah
  • Financial Literacy Education Advocate
  • Utah Business Community Leader
  • Retirement Planning Speaker
500+ Families Served
15+ Years Experience

Radio Show Expertise

Michael Stevens regularly discusses these key retirement planning topics on Utah radio programs.

Retirement Income Planning

Creating sustainable income streams in retirement, including portfolio management strategies and withdrawal planning.

Social Security Optimization

Maximizing Social Security benefits through strategic claiming decisions and spousal benefit optimization.

Tax Planning Strategies

Minimizing taxes in retirement through strategic tax planning, Roth conversions, and asset location strategies.

Federal Employee Benefits

Specialized guidance for federal employees on FERS optimization, TSP planning, and pension timing.

Market Volatility & Risk

Protecting retirement savings from market downturns and managing investment risk as you approach or enter retirement.

Estate Planning Basics

Essential estate planning strategies for retirees, including beneficiary planning and wealth transfer techniques.

Media Inquiries

Michael Stevens is available for interviews, expert commentary, and retirement planning insights.

Available For:

  • Radio interviews
  • Expert commentary
  • Market analysis
  • Retirement planning insights
  • Tax law changes
  • Social Security updates
  • Federal benefits analysis
  • Economic impact on retirees

Speaking & Educational Events

Michael Stevens is available for workshops, seminars, and educational presentations on retirement planning topics.

Retirement Planning Workshops

Comprehensive workshops covering the essentials of retirement income planning, tax strategies, and Social Security optimization for groups and organizations.

Federal Employee Seminars

Specialized presentations for federal employees on maximizing FERS benefits, TSP optimization, and preparing for federal retirement.

Corporate Financial Education

Employee education sessions on 401(k) planning, retirement readiness, and financial wellness for Utah businesses.

Book Michael Stevens for Your Event

Professional, educational presentations tailored to your audience's retirement planning needs.

Request Speaking Engagement

Expertise. Authority. Trust.

Why media outlets and Utah families trust Capital Wealth Advisors for retirement planning insights.

Proven Track Record

Over 15 years serving Utah families with comprehensive retirement planning. 500+ families served with over $500 million in assets under guidance.

Professional Credentials

Series 66 certified Investment Adviser Representative operating under the fiduciary standard. Licensed and regulated financial professional.

Community Leadership

Board member of Junior Achievement of Utah, committed to financial education and community development throughout the state.

Transparent Approach

Fee-only, fiduciary financial advisor with no hidden conflicts. Client testimonials and transparent pricing reflect our commitment to ethical service.
